name: GNOME Widget Center
description: Desktop widget platform for GNOME Shell — a plugin loader, per-widget JSON settings, drag & drop, and a Control Center for managing widgets. Ships with clock and media-player (MPRIS) example widgets. See development/tasks/ROADMAP.md and development/tests/e2e-checklist.md for current verification status — core (tasks 00-09) is code-complete but not yet confirmed end-to-end on real GNOME Shell hardware.
